messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.
Criar Object Storage Object com Terraform?

## Object Storage Object

### Upload File

```hcl
resource "oci_object_storage_object" "file" {
  namespace    = var.namespace
  bucket_name = oci_object_storage_bucket.bucket.name
  object      = "uploads/myfile.txt"
  content     = file("localfile.txt")
  content_type = "text/plain"
}
```

### Upload from Body

```hcl
resource "oci_object_storage_object" "data" {
  namespace    = var.namespace
  bucket_name = oci_object_storage_bucket.bucket.name
  object      = "data.json"
  content     = jsonencode({
    key = "value"
  })
}
```

### Multipart Upload

```hcl
resource "oci_object_storage_object" "large_file" {
  namespace    = var.namespace
  bucket_name = oci_object_storage_bucket.bucket.name
  object      = "largefile.iso"
  source      = "largefile.iso"
  content_type = "application/octet-stream"
}
```

### Lifecycle

- Objects < 10GB: simples upload
- Objects > 10GB: multipart
